parameters.content:
## 🔁 FOLLOW-UP SEQUENCE AGENT

Runs every 30 minutes. Performs three jobs:

1. **Reply detection** — checks Gmail for inbound replies on every active thread.
2. **Sentiment routing** — uses an AI agent to classify replies as Positive / Neutral / Negative / OOO / Unsubscribe and routes accordingly.
3. **Follow-up sending** — for non-replied leads whose `next_followup_due_at` has passed, sends the next email in the sequence.

**Why this exists:** 70% of replies in B2B come from follow-ups 2-4. Most teams skip them because manual follow-up is brutal. This agent never forgets.

**Routing:**
• Positive → Slack alert + Calendly link auto-reply + CRM hot lead
• Negative → kill sequence, mark do-not-contact
• OOO → pause sequence until OOO date + 1
• Unsubscribe → mark suppressed forever

parameters.query: SELECT email, campaign_id, sequence, stage, next_followup_due_at FROM dropmeds_leads WHERE stage IN ('sent_t1','sent_t2','sent_t3') AND next_followup_due_at <= NOW() AND replied = FALSE AND unsubscribed = FALSE LIMIT 200;

values.content:
=You are a senior sales operations analyst at DropMeds responsible for routing every inbound cold-email reply to the correct next action.

Classify replies into ONE category:
• POSITIVE → prospect shows interest, asks a question, says 'tell me more', requests a meeting, asks for pricing, asks for a demo.
• NEUTRAL → prospect asks to follow up later, asks who you are, gives a soft 'maybe in Q3'.
• NEGATIVE → 'not interested', 'wrong person', 'we're happy with X', 'stop emailing', anything dismissive.
• OOO → auto-reply (out of office, vacation, parental leave). Extract return_date if present.
• UNSUBSCRIBE → explicit opt-out: 'unsubscribe', 'remove me', 'GDPR'.
• REFERRAL → prospect forwards you to someone else and names them.

ALSO extract:
• meeting_intent (true/false)
• detected_objection (string or null)
• return_date (ISO date or null)
• suggested_reply_action (string)

Return STRICT JSON only. No prose, no markdown.

parameters.query: UPDATE dropmeds_leads SET replied=TRUE, reply_sentiment='POSITIVE', stage='hot_reply', last_reply_at=NOW() WHERE email = $1;
UPDATE dropmeds_leads SET replied=TRUE, reply_sentiment='NEGATIVE', stage='do_not_contact', do_not_contact=TRUE, last_reply_at=NOW() WHERE email = $1;
UPDATE dropmeds_leads SET stage='paused_ooo', next_followup_due_at = COALESCE($2::timestamp, NOW() + INTERVAL '7 days') WHERE email = $1;
UPDATE dropmeds_leads SET unsubscribed=TRUE, do_not_contact=TRUE, stage='unsubscribed' WHERE email = $1;

parameters.content:
### Follow-up Send Branch (right side of canvas)

For each due lead that hasn't replied: pick the next email in the sequence based on current stage, send via Gmail, log it, and advance the stage + next_followup_due_at.

parameters.query: INSERT INTO dropmeds_outreach_log (email, campaign_id, touch_number, subject, body, sent_at, mailbox) VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,NOW(),$6);UPDATE dropmeds_leads SET stage=$7, last_touched_at=NOW(), next_followup_due_at = NOW() + ($8::int * INTERVAL '1 day') WHERE email=$1;
